old_value: {"id":"project-LICHEN-5ix1.4.2","title":"Trace ping_l2 canary and auth failures","description":"Reproduce ping_l2 on ARM64 and x86_64 Native64 while tracing the idle canary and the two preceding lichen_l2 authentication failures (-200).
